shape: T~L~695~-280~0~#0000FF~~12pt~~~~comment~Using ceramics on VCOMH pin of OLED may result in \nannoying high pitch whistling. Tantalum is recommended.~1~start~gge8156~0~pinpart

T~L~695~-235~0~#0000FF~~12pt~~~~comment~WEO012864 (31pin short cable) series has compatible pinout 
except the contacts exposed on the opposite side of cable
so FPC connector should have corresponding contact orientation.
Standard 30pin FPC connector can be used with pin 1 removed
on the cable.~1~start~gge8158~0~pinpart
T~L~695~-105~0~#0000FF~~12pt~~~~comment~Jumper on pins 1-2 of H3 enables FW upgrade mode.~1~start~gge11424~0~pinpart
T~L~695~-145~0~#0000FF~~12pt~~~~comment~Pins 1 (VDDB) and 4 (VSL) of the FPC connector are reserved \nfor OLED displays based on the SSD1325 driver chip.~1~start~gge16577~0~pinpart
